e:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Structured knowledge storage using a temporal knowledge graph. Stores facts, relationships, and concepts as subject-predicate-object triples with temporal metadata."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Triple Schema"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Column | Type | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]," | TEXT | UUIDv4 |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"subject"}]," | TEXT | Entity (e.g., \"Alice\") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"predicate"}]," | TEXT | Relationship (e.g., \"knows\") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"object"}]," | TEXT | Target entity or value |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"confidence"}]," | REAL | 0.0–1.0 fact confidence |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source_mem_id"}]," | TEXT | Originating Working Memory entry |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_from"}]," | INTEGER | When fact became true |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," | INTEGER | When fact expired (NULL = current) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]," | INTEGER | Record timestamp |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Example Triples"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Subject | Predicate | Object | Confidence |\n|---------|-----------|--------|------------|\n| Alice | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"prefers_language"}]," | Go | 0.95 |\n| Project Alpha | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"has_deadline"}]," | 2026-05-01 | 0.90 |\n| Bob | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"reports_to"}]," | Carol | 0.85 |\n| API v2 | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"depends_on"}]," | Auth Service | 0.80 |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Temporal Validity"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Facts can expire or be superseded:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Add a fact\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-01\",\n  confidence=0.90,\n)\n\n# Update with new information (old fact auto-expires)\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  predicate=\"has_deadline\",\n  object=\"2026-05-15\",\n  confidence=0.95,\n)\n\n# Query current facts only\nfacts = mem.query_facts(\n  subject=\"Project Alpha\",\n  current_only=True,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Graph Queries"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Direct lookup\nfacts = mem.query_facts(subject=\"Alice\")\n\n# Relationship traversal\nrelated = mem.traverse(subject=\"Alice\", depth=2)\n\n# Pattern matching\nmatches = mem.query_facts(\n  predicate=\"reports_to\",\n  object=\"Carol\",\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Extraction from Working Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne automatically extracts triples during consolidation:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  WM[Working Memory Entry] -->|NLP extraction| T[Candidate Triples]\n  T -->|confidence &gt; 0.7| SM[Semantic Memory]\n  T -->|confidence &lt; 0.7| DISCARD[Discard]\n"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Extraction uses a lightweight local model (no API calls) and runs during sleep cycles."}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Schema Flexibility"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory has no predefined ontology. Predicates are free-form strings. This allows dynamic knowledge domains without schema migrations."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0ch_p3vkb0uw2.js","async":true}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","async":true}],"$L5","$L6","$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb"],"$Lc"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
